column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Standing as spring breeze flutters kimono sleeves" | TEXT="風が気持ちいい" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Closing eyes, feeling the breeze" | TEXT="そよ風" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding down gently fluttering sleeves" | TEXT="ひらひら" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling softly looking into the wind" | TEXT="春の匂い" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up as hair softly blows" | TEXT="爽やか" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a wagasa against the gentle wind" | TEXT="いいお天気" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Looking back elegantly" | TEXT="行きましょうか" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Walking gracefully" | TEXT="足取りも軽く" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving warmly" | TEXT="こっちよ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Surprised by a sudden stronger gust" | TEXT="わっ！" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hair and kimono desperately" | TEXT="大変！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing helplessly as wind messes hair" | TEXT="あははは" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking embarrassed fixing hair" | TEXT="乱れちゃった" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting slightly" | TEXT="風のいたずら" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing softly" | TEXT="もうっ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="直った！" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling playfully" | TEXT="大丈夫" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Winking happily" | TEXT="気にしない"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Shivering as the breeze is slightly cold" | TEXT="ちょっと寒いかも" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Rubbing shoulders gently" | TEXT="ぶるっ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Sneezing delicately" | TEXT="くしゅんっ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking apologetic" | TEXT="ごめんなさい" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Wrapping a beautiful shawl" | TEXT="これで平気" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling in relief" | TEXT="あったかい" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an OK sign" | TEXT="ご心配なく" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding encouragingly" | TEXT="さぁ、続きを" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands once" | TEXT="よしっ！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Pondering looking at a wind chime" | TEXT="ちりんちりん" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Tilting head gracefully" | TEXT="いい音色" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking melancholic in the breeze" | TEXT="少し寂しい" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing deeply" | TEXT="はぁ…" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Shaking head gently" | TEXT="なんてね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling forcefully" | TEXT="元気出さなきゃ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Patting own cheeks completely gently" | TEXT="ぱんぱんっ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="A bright smile returning" | TEXT="よし！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing forward" | TEXT="あそこに行こう"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting gracefully on a bench in the breeze" | TEXT="ひと休み" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sleepy as the breeze continues" | TEXT="ぽかぽかする" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning gracefully" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Rubbing eyes" | TEXT="眠くなってきた" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping happily leaning slightly" | TEXT="ウトウト" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Waking up blushing" | TEXT="あっ！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Hiding face with sleeve" | TEXT="恥ずかしい" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking extremely apologetic" | TEXT="寝てました" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Sticking tongue out playfully" | TEXT="てへぇ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hands in the breeze" | TEXT="手つなごっ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking deeply into eyes" | TEXT="見惚れちゃった" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Turning away blushing" | TEXT="嘘です" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing purely" | TEXT="うふふ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye warmly" | TEXT="また明日ね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Blowing a gentle kiss" | TEXT="ちゅっ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Running away gracefully" | TEXT="きゃー" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Stopping to turn back and wave" | TEXT="バイバイ！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling completely happily" | TEXT="大好き"
